heading: Guam and Virgin Islands included as “State”
label: 255 Guam and Virgin Islands included as “State”
text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “State” includes Guam and the Virgin Islands.
notes: Amendments2016— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–328section 335 of this title2006— struck out “the unincorporated territories of” before “Guam”.Pub. L. 109–1631980— inserted “and Virgin Islands” after “Guam” in section catchline and inserted provision respecting applicability to the Virgin Islands.Pub. L. 96–513
